title: ilrestodelcarlino.it
description: This article from ilrestodelcarlino.it reports on an EU-funded "Miso-Info" research project led by Fabio Giglietto, Professor of Digital Sociology at the University of Urbino, focusing on misinformation in online social systems and algorithmic influence, particularly regarding health and climate change.

title: Facebook premia gli estremisti: la ricerca dell'Università di Urbino - Lumsanews

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: This news article details a research study published by the University of Urbino, led by Professor Fabio Giglietto, which concludes that Facebook's algorithms are reducing the visibility of institutional politics while amplifying anti-European extremist content. The study analyzed over 2.5 million Facebook posts.
description: A news article detailing a study led by Professor Fabio Giglietto at the University of Urbino, which found Facebook's algorithms amplify extremist content and reduce visibility of institutional politics.

CS2Nordics - Nordic Society for Computational Social Science
snippet: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a member of the Program Committee for the CS2Nordics 2026 conference, the first plenary meeting of the Nordic Society for Computational Social Science. The conference, scheduled for September 21-22, 2026, focuses on research at the intersection of computational methods and social and behavioral sciences.
description: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a member of the Program Committee for the CS2Nordics 2026 conference, a key event for computational social science research.
